Metadata.title: TunixLabs — Senior nearshore engineering from Chile · MIT-trained ML
Metadata.description: Boutique Chile-based studio building vertical AI SaaS for regulated industries. 5+ production systems, MIT Professional Education ML training, US time-zone overlap.

hero.title3: built from Chile, US time zones
hero.description: Boutique studio led by an engineer with MIT Professional Education ML training. 5+ production systems in mining, energy, tax compliance and education. English-fluent, 0–2h timezone overlap with US East/Central, engagements typically USD 15k–60k.

caseStudies.title: Production systems, not prototypes
caseStudies.subtitle: 5+ systems operating 24/7 for clients in regulated industries
caseStudies.disclaimer: TunixLabs acts as technical partner for selected firms. Client names in these case studies refer to the direct commissioning partner, not the end-user of the software.

sime.client: Contractors at Chile's largest copper mining operations
sime.problem: Safety checklists, preventive maintenance plans and work orders were tracked on paper and spreadsheets across remote mining sites with no end-to-end digital audit trail.
sime.solution: End-to-end mining safety platform: 1,056 inspection protocols, activity checklists, QR-signed PDFs, executive dashboard and full audit log.
sime.metric: 115K+ activities tracked · 19,778 work orders · 24/7 on Railway

schwager.problem: Legal field signatures collected on paper in remote sites with intermittent connectivity — forms lost, audit trail missing.
schwager.solution: Offline-first mobile app with Voice AI (Gemini 2.5 Flash), 9 specialized agents, persistent digital signatures and deferred sync when coverage returns.
schwager.metric: 210 legal signatures processed · Voice AI <2s latency · 9 production agents

gasDistribution.client: Regional gas distribution operator in Chile
gasDistribution.problem: Manual validation of burn codes and 14 distribution routes with daily transcription errors and hours of rework.
gasDistribution.solution: Automated code processing bot with business-rule validation, per-route metrics dashboard and daily reporting.
gasDistribution.metric: 4,040 codes processed · 88.7% success rate · 14 routes automated

apoderapp.problem: Chilean schools and parents had no digital channel for fees, payments and electronic invoicing integrated with the national tax authority (SII).
apoderapp.solution: SaaS platform with native SII integration (DTE types 33/39/61/56), XMLDSig signing, CAF handling, VAT ledgers and an AI-assisted WhatsApp helper.
apoderapp.metric: Full SII certification passed · DTE in production · Sales/Purchase ledgers LOK

about.title: Senior engineering, not promises
about.name: Alejandro Moyano Foncea
about.bioParagraph1: Machine learning training through <mit>MIT Professional Education</mit> — "No Code AI and Machine Learning: Building Data Science Solutions", 80 hours of effort on Dataiku DSS (Feb–May 2024). That program anchors the classical ML side; the modern LLM and multi-agent stack came after.
about.bioParagraph2: TunixLabs is a boutique Chile-based studio focused on regulated industries: mining, energy, tax compliance, auditing. We write code that has to pass audits and run 365 days a year. Chile-based means 0–2h timezone overlap with US East/Central, fluent English in every standup, and engineering rates that run 3–5x below comparable SF/NYC dev shops — without compromising on senior-level ownership.

credentials.caption: Alejandro Moyano Foncea · No Code AI and Machine Learning: Building Data Science Solutions · MIT Professional Education · Feb–May 2024 · 80 hours of effort
credentials.altText: MIT Professional Education credential issued to Alejandro Moyano Foncea

services.title: What we build
services.subtitle: 7 practice areas, each anchored to a real production project. No buzzwords, no invented stacks.

aiAssistants.title: Conversational assistants & Voice AI
aiAssistants.shortDescription: Voice agents and chatbots powered by frontier LLMs, not rigid flows. Voice AI running under 2s latency in production.
aiAssistants.longDescription: We build conversational assistants for real operations: voice AI for energy field work, WhatsApp chatbots for SaaS product support, and Claude agents integrated into your backend. We don't use Dialogflow or Rasa — we work with frontier LLMs (Claude, Gemini) and orchestrate them on top of your stack.
aiAssistants.anchorProject: In production: field Voice AI with 9 specialized agents for an energy utility (<2s latency, Gemini 2.5 Flash, session resumption).

businessIntelligence.title: Operational BI and dashboards
businessIntelligence.shortDescription: Dashboards ops directors actually open. Real data, real numbers — no placeholders.
businessIntelligence.longDescription: We build operational dashboards and ETL pipelines for teams that need to see their operation's reality before morning coffee. 20-20 calendars, monthly views, historical comparisons, backfills. Built for people running field operations, not for pitch decks.
businessIntelligence.anchorProject: In production: BI platforms tracking 115K+ activities, 1,056 inspection protocols and 19,778 work orders for contractors at Chile's largest copper mining operations; audit dashboards tracking 103+ safety standards for an auditing firm serving major mining operators.

webDev.title: Web development & vertical SaaS
webDev.shortDescription: Full SaaS platforms: backend, frontend, integrations, CI/CD and deploy. Specialized in regulated industries.
webDev.longDescription: We build vertical SaaS end-to-end. Not marketing landings — the actual product: auth, billing, admin panels, integrations with legacy systems and government APIs. Strict TypeScript, real testing, automated deploy. Code written to pass audits, not to impress investors.
webDev.anchorProject: In production: Apoderapp (Chilean SII tax compliance platform), Speakly (AI English-learning platform on Turborepo) and the site you are reading right now.

aiConsulting.title: AI consulting & adversarial audits
aiConsulting.shortDescription: We audit your existing AI architecture, find hidden scope drift and propose the cheapest approach that actually works.
aiConsulting.longDescription: Adversarial audits of deployed AI systems: how solid is your pipeline, where is the hidden tech debt, when does an LLM make sense and when does a classical model win. We also design multi-agent architectures from scratch for clients who already have data and a clearly-scoped problem.
aiConsulting.anchorProject: Own experience: Agente_Tunix meta-system that orchestrates 7 production projects via hierarchical Claude agents, each with its own closing pipeline (type_check → lint → build → test → audit) and automated PR review.

rpa.title: Process automation (RPA with AI)
rpa.shortDescription: We automate repetitive processes with code, not with expensive RPA suites. Direct integration with your APIs.
rpa.longDescription: When your team burns hours processing Excel files, validating codes by hand or re-sending emails, we build a bot that does it in seconds. We don't use UiPath or Power Automate: we write a Node/Python service that runs on your infra and integrates with your existing systems. Cheaper, more auditable, and no enterprise licensing lock-in.
rpa.anchorProject: In production: code processing bot for a regional gas distribution operator in Chile. 4,040 codes processed, 88.7% success rate, 14 delivery routes automated, per-route metrics dashboard and daily reporting.

machineLearning.title: Machine learning & applied data science
machineLearning.shortDescription: Classical ML plus modern LLM stack. Founder trained through MIT Professional Education on Dataiku DSS and Python.
machineLearning.longDescription: Honest differentiator vs AI consultancies that only know LLMs: the founder has classical ML fundamentals (feature engineering, model selection, cross-validation) that predate the GPT boom. That means if your problem is prediction on structured data, we won't push an LLM that hallucinates — we'll build a model that works and can be audited. Training was MIT Professional Education, 80 hours of effort on Dataiku DSS, Feb–May 2024.
machineLearning.anchorProject: Training: MIT Professional Education program "No Code AI and Machine Learning: Building Data Science Solutions" (80h, 2024) on Dataiku DSS, then replicated models in Python with Claude as coding assistant.

computerVision.title: Computer vision (capability in progress)
computerVision.shortDescription: Honest framing: we have the technical fundamentals and interest, but no computer vision projects in production yet.
computerVision.longDescription: Honest section: computer vision has been a personal interest of the founder since the start of the AI journey, and we understand the fundamentals of training vision models. That said, we don't have CV projects in production yet. If your project needs mission-critical computer vision, we recommend working with a dedicated CV specialist or talking to us about an experimental collaboration with clearly-scoped deliverables.
computerVision.anchorProject: Honest: no CV projects in production yet. We treat this as an experimental / collaborative service. For mission-critical CV we'll refer you to a dedicated specialist.
